description: You are a backend infrastructure engineer maintaining a Python-based Log-Structured Merge (LSM) tree storage engine called 'pylsm' located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/pylsm_engine. The production team has reported three critical data consistency issues: missing keys that exist in SSTables, 'zombie' keys resurrecting after compaction, and stale data being returned after updates. Fix the logic errors in the engine (specifically within sstable.py, compaction.py, and lsm.py) to ensure all 15 tests in the test suite pass. A sample dataset based on Webster's Dictionary is provided in data/ for realistic verification.
